log.context:
The workflow started successfully despite the segfault at teardown (a known Python/Temporal SDK GIL cleanup issue on process exit). The workflow ID printed before the crash was:

**`congress-1774322559`**

The `started: congress-1774322559` line confirmed the workflow was submitted to Temporal before the process exited. The segfault only occurred during Python interpreter shutdown, not during the actual workflow start call.
